mapper.insert: merge into USER_AUTHORITY a using (select #{userAuthority.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as userId, #{userAuthority.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as id ) b on (a.USERID = b.userId and upper(a.ID)=upper(b.id)) when matched then update set CMN_MEMO = #{userAuthority.cmnMemo} , MODULECODE =#{userAuthority.moduleCode} , MODULENAME = #{userAuthority.moduleName}, ISCREATER = #{userAuthority.isCreater} , USERNAME = #{userAuthority.userName}, CMN_NAME =#{userAuthority.cmnName} , CREATE_TIME = CURRENT_DATE when not matched then insert (ID,CMN_MEMO,MODULECODE,MODULENAME,ISCREATER,USERNAME,USERID,CMN_NAME) values(#{userAuthority.id},#{userAuthority.cmnMemo},#{userAuthority.moduleCode},#{userAuthority.moduleName},#{userAuthority.isCreater} ,#{userAuthority.userName},#{userAuthority.userId},#{userAuthority.cmnName})
